name: Optile
description: Open payment orchestration platform providing centralized routing and provider management for merchants.

seo.title: Optile — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: Optile: Open payment orchestration platform providing centralized routing and provider management for merchants.

when_to_use: Centralizing routing across 50+ payment providers via one layer
Adding new local payment methods without re-integration
Managing PSP contracts and performance via no-code dashboard

pros: Early entrant in open orchestration platforms
Now backed by Payoneer for broader reach
cons: Brand largely absorbed into Payoneer Checkout
Public roadmap and updates have slowed
Less clarity on standalone product future
review.verdict: Once a leading orchestrator, now blurred into Payoneer Checkout; evaluate the current Payoneer offering instead.
review.best_for: Existing Optile customers continuing on the platform via Payoneer Checkout.
review.not_for: New buyers who should evaluate current-generation orchestrators with active product investment.
